example_reviews: more like my good friend.. light of my loneliness...
it really makes me feel great that I can move on now.
Wysa helped me get better! thanks to wysa I'm feeling good, yesterday was bad, but I smiled downloading wysa!
It's even better than I imagine
always felt this was an amazing app. the fact you don't need to put in any information except a nickname makes it feel like I can really write down what's bothering me.
this app help calm me during anxiety and is definitely one of the better self care apps
it relieves my anxiety, overall it's a really good app and it listens well
Even the chat bot wysa is helpful alot of times I ask wysa questions an it helps me out alot...I was dealing with stress in my head an it helped me to redirect my thoughts to positivity
This really help me overcome my overthinking and anxiety, by having someone to talk to, it makes me feels so much better. Thank you so much for creating this app!
Helps with depression and anxiety. Offers to give you a coach that will help you. I highly recommend
thank you for developing this app i am really thankfull to you
By asking the right questions, wysa helps me to unclutter my thoughts and understand what the main issues are so that I could move forward.
Can't even get in. I write a nickname and says Oops something went wrong...
It has helped me so much already and I only have done one lesson and am already starting to feel better
Woah, just 7MB for a life-saving bot? Wysa has helped me extremely and I really appreciate it!

this app not suitable for someone who as a real mental fatigue, instead of helping, accompany, or giving suggestion, it will just keep pushing to think think and think. instead of understanding our condition, it just make us trying to understand how the bot works. i dont even know why people give it 5 stars (?)
Intensely dystopian that this exists, talk to your friends please. Talk to anybody, talk to a PERSON.
Doesn't acknowledge anything I say and has its own random conversation with itself. Couldn't even call it functional. Terrible app.

The app deserves 100 stars. Customer service refused to speak to me. Live support team won't speak to me. I had important questions to ask. I left them emails and they ignored me. So customer service gets 1 star for flagrantly ignoring me.

doesn't really seem to be a fair price tbh, it's a extremely high sub cost with the classic free week to make you forget till you're charged. It's a predatory AI LLM bot that at best will charge money for a vurable person. truefully it's disgusting and rather dystopian.
I am slowly recovering from mental breakdown, but this app is really helpful. I am recommending those who have the same feeling as I had.
this helped me with my depression and mental health so much! this is the best app I've ever had!
it's a really helpful app for people with suicide thoughts and self harm urges. definitely recommend

This has helped me so much. I suffer from chronic pain and bipolar anxiety panic disorder ptsd etc and I've found this app to be so helpful just by having someone even though its a bot to listen. I know I can always be connected to a real person if I need help.

I have anxiety and I'm hard on myself and within just one night I feel like a weight has been listed just by talking to the AI about a few different subjects and doing some breathing exercises! I really love this app
